name: Morning Briefing
command: Good morning! Give me a quick briefing and open gaming news.

name: Stream Reminder
command: Remind me to start my stream. Open OBS and check my Twitch status.

name: Gaming News Evening
command: What's the latest gaming news? Open it in the browser.

name: Sleep Reminder
command: It's 2 AM, you should probably sleep. Should I put the system to sleep?
